title: S + was/were + p.p.（過去被動）

formulas.zh: 主詞 + 過去式 be 動詞 + 過去分詞
主詞 + 過去式 be 動詞 + 過去分詞 + 介詞 by + 動作執行者

explanation: 過去式被動語態用於表達過去某個時間點或時期內被執行的動作。單數主詞（I/he/she/it）搭配 was，複數主詞（we/they/you）搭配 were。過去分詞形式取決於動詞規則與否。by + agent 用於說明動作執行者，但非必須；若重點在於動作本身而非執行者，可省略。注意與過去簡單式主動語態的區別：被動強調受動者，主動強調動作者。

examples.eng: The letter was written by my grandfather last year.
examples.chi: 這封信是去年由我祖父寫的。

examples.eng: The building was destroyed in the earthquake that happened in 1999.
examples.chi: 這棟建築在 1999 年的地震中被摧毀了。

examples.eng: Were all the questions answered correctly by the students?
examples.chi: 所有的問題都被學生們正確回答了嗎？

examples.eng: The new policy was not accepted by the majority of employees.
examples.chi: 新政策沒有被大多數員工接受。

extension.tip: 判斷被動語態的關鍵在於主詞是否為動作的接收者。若主詞執行動作用主動語態（The teacher taught the lesson），若主詞接收動作用被動語態（The lesson was taught by the teacher）。注意過去分詞的正確形式，規則動詞加 -ed，不規則動詞需單獨記憶。

examples.test: 主動：Tom broke the window. / 被動：The window was broken by Tom.
examples.result: → 同一事件不同視角；被動強調窗戶被破，主動強調 Tom 的行為

examples.test: 過去分詞誤用：The house was build last month. (✗)
examples.result: → 正確：The house was built last month. (✓) 不規則動詞 build 的過去分詞為 built

examples.test: 省略 by agent：The book was published in 2020.
examples.result: → 不知道出版者但表達完整；若要強調出版者：by Oxford University Press

extension.note: 單數 was + p.p.，複數 were + p.p.；過去分詞形式影響整句正確性，務必掌握常見不規則動詞。

parts: by the local community hundreds of years ago.
exercises.sentence: The ancient temple was built by the local community hundreds of years ago.
exercises.translation: 這座古老的廟宇是在幾百年前由當地社區建造的。

parts: during the war and later recovered.
exercises.sentence: Many historical documents were hidden during the war and later recovered.
exercises.translation: 許多歷史文件在戰爭期間被隱藏，後來被找回。

parts: to the director because of his outstanding contribution to the film industry.
exercises.sentence: The award was presented to the director because of his outstanding contribution to the film industry.
exercises.translation: 由於導演對電影產業的傑出貢獻，該獎項被頒發給了他。

parts: by the head teacher last week?
exercises.sentence: Were the final exam questions approved by the head teacher last week?
exercises.translation: 期末考試題目上週是否被教務主任批准了？

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的過去被動語態形式，完成關於信件的句子。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The letter _______ to me by my friend yesterday.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A (was sent)。單數主詞 'the letter' 搭配 'was'，過去分詞 'sent' 表示過去動作已完成。B 項 'were' 用於複數主詞，不符。C 項 'is sent' 為現在簡單式，不符 'yesterday' 的時間。D 項 'has been sent' 為現在完成被動，時態不符。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確形式，完成關於建築物在地震中遭毀的句子。
mc_exercises.question_eng: Many buildings _______ damaged during the earthquake that struck the city in 2022.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C (had been)。複數主詞 'buildings' 需要 'were' 搭配過去分詞。但此處強調動作在過去事件（地震）發生前已完成，應用過去完成被動 'had been + p.p.'。A 項 'were being' 為過去進行被動，不符情境。B 項 'were' 為簡單過去被動，時態層次不足。D 項 'are' 為現在式，時態錯誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇最適當的過去被動形式，完成關於古老遺跡的句子。
mc_exercises.question_eng: The ancient temple _______ by archaeologists for several months before its historical significance _______ finally recognized.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B (had been excavated; was)。第一空需過去完成被動 'had been excavated'，表示挖掘在「歷史意義被認可」之前已進行數月。第二空用簡單過去被動 'was recognized'，表示被認可是一次性過去事件。A 項第一空的過去進行被動不強調持續期間。C 項第一空時態正確但第二空 'had been' 不符。D 項 'has been' 為現在完成式，不符過去時間框架。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇最恰當的過去被動形式，表達複雜的時間關係。
mc_exercises.question_eng: By the time the investigation _______ completed, three former executives _______ already _______ charged with embezzlement.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C (had been; were; been)。第一空需過去完成被動 'had been completed'，表示調查在「高管被控」之前已完成。'by the time' 常跟過去完成式。第二空用簡單過去被動 'were charged'，與 'had been' 形成時序對比。A 項第一空 'was' 時態層次不足。B 項句構不完整，缺過去分詞。D 項 'was being' 和 'had been been' 皆不符語法。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 昨天我的手機在公車上被偷了。
translation_exercises.answer: My phone was stolen on the bus yesterday.
hints: 提示1：主詞 my phone 為單數，故使用 was + p.p.
提示2：注意不要寫成 My phone stole（主動）或 was stole（分詞錯誤）

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 這份報告是由我的同學在昨晚完成的。
translation_exercises.answer: This report was completed by my classmate last night.
hints: 提示1：強調『誰完成』時需加 by + agent；框架為 S + was + p.p. + by + agent
提示2：不要漏掉 by，也要確認 completed 為完成時的過去分詞

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 在升學考試期間，許多學生的成績被認為是衡量成功的唯一標準。
translation_exercises.answer: During the entrance exam period, many students' grades were considered the only standard of success.
key_points: were considered（複數主詞搭配 were）
時間狀語 During the entrance exam period
hints: 提示1：主詞 grades 為複數，故使用 were + p.p.；此句未明確提及執行者，省略 by agent
提示2：注意 consider 的過去分詞是 considered（規則動詞）；avoid 主動語態 Students' grades considered...（文法錯誤）

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 雖然這個計劃最初是由校長提出的，但它在實施前被全校師生廣泛討論並進行了多次修改。
translation_exercises.answer: Although this plan was initially proposed by the principal, it was widely discussed by the whole school community and was modified several times before implementation.
key_points: was proposed / was discussed / was modified（三個過去被動結構）
by + agent 的使用（第一、二句）
時間狀語 before implementation / initially
hints: 提示1：複合句中多個被動語態串聯；主詞 plan 為單數，全用 was + p.p.
提示2：留意並列結構的一致性（was proposed... was discussed... was modified）；注意 modified 為規則動詞的過去分詞；『廣泛討論』可用 widely discussed 強調
